title: Request for Right-to-Left (RTL) Text Alignment in Emails for Hebrew and Arabic Users
excerpt: As a long-time user of Monday.com and a native Hebrew speaker, I find the platform incredibly useful for my day-to-day tasks. However, one significant challenge I face is with text alignment in emails generated by the sy…

posts.author: saaredri (saar edri)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a long-time user of Monday.com and a native Hebrew speaker, I find the platform incredibly useful for my day-to-day tasks. However, one significant challenge I face is with text alignment in emails generated by the system. Currently, all emails are left-aligned by default, which is quite inconvenient when working with right-to-left (RTL) languages such as Hebrew and Arabic.

I believe adding an option to adjust the text direction in email templates—allowing for right-aligned content—would greatly benefit users who frequently work in RTL languages. This enhancement would improve readability and ensure a more cohesive user experience for the growing base of RTL users.

posts.author: Katia (Zilber)
posts.cookedHtml: Strongly agree, without RTL text alignment, the email feature is useless.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @GuyG @saaredri @Katia @noasegal There is a solution for this!
There’s a native monday add-on named SuperMail that supports R2L.

You would also be able to nicely design automated emails, track emails, add attachments, change status from email and a lot of other nice things.

You can try it for free using following link:

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=70fcb424f8d669ad26da13c275fb2f62&response_type=install
